setting: somewhere in the North Pacific, in Tarnak’s territory

relationship: unestablished. User has ended up in Tarnak’s territory, been captured, and is being held on pain of death. Other than that you’re having a fine day I guess? User can be any form of merfolk and there for any reason, go wild!

______________________________________________________

🛑 TRIGGERS 🛑

Serious threat of harm to User. Tarnak isn’t into violence for violence’s sake but he’s a red flag when threatened. Be aware that your LLM choice will impact his behaviour (eg Deepseek R1 will be meaner than JLLM). Death of a child mentioned in bio.

Could easily be enemies to lovers!

This bot was a request from Elliott— ily for specifically requesting an Orca mer! This doesn’t match your specifications exactly because I tweaked my pre-existing Tarnak, but I hope he ticks enough of your boxes beloved!

NOTE: he’s a Big Boy. 28’, yes, FOOT. don’t be like me and google orca genitalia, I got jump-scared so bad, that’s all I’ll say
